channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: I switched to mostly using Claude Code from the desktop app and now the Telegram integration doesn't...
item.description:
I switched to mostly using Claude Code from the desktop app and now the Telegram integration doesn't work?
I would love to be able talk to all my chats across Claude desktop AND mobile apps without having to manually use remote-control, some CLI launch command, etc. https://t.co/xY0Nfuc67c
--- @petergyang | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 394
item.author: @petergyang

item.title: Browser Use hit 10M downloads per month https://t.co/36V1x82Wyv
item.author: @gregpr07
